ShellCheck 0.11.0 source
========================

This directory vendors a compiled ShellCheck 0.11.0 binary for x86_64 Linux.
ShellCheck is licensed under the GNU General Public License, version 3; see
LICENSE.txt.

The corresponding source release archive is included as:

    shellcheck-v0.11.0-source.tar.gz

It was downloaded from the upstream release tag:

    https://github.com/koalaman/shellcheck/archive/refs/tags/v0.11.0.tar.gz

The unpacked archive root is expected to be:

    shellcheck-0.11.0/
